description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fedora:29 Docker image for both jobs and define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs: dnf install gcc git mingw32-gcc mingw64-gcc unzip xz zip -y; export CHOOSENIM_NO_ANALYTICS=1; export CHOOSENIM_CHOOSE_VERSION="stable"; curl https://nim-lang.org/choosenim/init.sh -sSf > init.sh; sh init.sh -y; export PATH="$HOME/.nimble/bin:$PATH"; mkdir -p dist/; nimble build -d:release --passc:"-flto" -y; strip clr; mkdir -p clr-linux-x86_64/; mv clr clr-linux-x86_64/; cp README.md LICENSE.md clr-linux-x86_64/; tar cfJ dist/clr-linux-x86_64.tar.xz clr-linux-x86_64/; curl -O https://nim-lang.org/download/dlls.zip; unzip dlls.zip; nimble build -d:release --passc:"-flto" -d:mingw; strip clr.exe pcre64.dll; mkdir -p clr-windows-x86_64/; mv clr.exe pcre64.dll clr-windows-x86_64/; cp README.md LICENSE.md clr-windows-x86_64/; zip -r9 dist/clr-windows-x86_64.zip clr-windows-x86_64/; rm /usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc; ln -s /usr/bin/i686-w64-mingw32-gcc /usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-gcc; nimble build -d:release --passc:"-flto" -d:mingw --cpu:i386; strip clr.exe pcre32.dll; mkdir -p clr-windows-x86/; mv clr.exe pcre32.dll clr-windows-x86/; cp README.md LICENSE.md clr-windows-x86/; zip -r9 dist/clr-windows-x86.zip clr-windows-x86/; and stores the dist/ directory as an artifact that expires in 30 days. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on tags, installs golang with dnf, gets the gothub tool via go get github.com/itchio/gothub, exports PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$PATH", creates a GitHub release with gothub release --tag "$CI_COMMIT_TAG" (ignoring errors), and uploads the three artifacts using gothub upload --tag "$CI_COMMIT_TAG" --name "clr-$CI_COMMIT_TAG-linux-x86_64.tar.xz" --file "dist/clr-linux-x86_64.tar.xz", gothub upload --tag "$CI_COMMIT_TAG" --name "clr-$CI_COMMIT_TAG-windows-x86_64.zip" --file "dist/clr-windows-x86_64.zip", and gothub upload --tag "$CI_COMMIT_TAG" --name "clr-$CI_COMMIT_TAG-windows-x86.zip" --file "dist/clr-windows-x86.zip"; the deploy job depends on the build job.
